calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nancy E. Lofdahl for Claudio Magobet, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court inquired about a civil case, which at a prior hearing on December 10th, Ms. Lofdahl had indicated would be dismissed. Ms. Lofdahl stated that the civil case has not yet been dismissed because there is no estate representative to proceed in the matter. The petitioner has decided to withdraw the request for appointment as administrator and requested the court deny the petition for appointment without prejudice. Ms. Lofdahl also stated that the plaintiff's attorney in the civil case has been informed of the petitioner's decision, and the civil case will be dismissed as no representative is available to proceed.

The court denied the Amended Petition for Probate without prejudice.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2024 Continued To Jan-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl appeared via zoom for Claudio Magobet (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the home, that it will stay in the father's estate, and that Ms. Lofdahl will be filing a dismissal. The matter is continued to January 14, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by January 7, 2025.


Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.
